title: District-wise MGNREGA Data at a Glance
_fixture_note: CONSTRUCTED, not a raw pull: ONE deliberately messy row that drives the Stage-2 orchestrator's composed FMT->TYPE->DATE paths end-to-end — the gaps the clean golden fixtures (goa_2022_2023, duplicate_snapshot) never exercise (audit finding F5). Persondays '1,234' = comma-bearing INT (FMT strip_commas + TYPE str->int: BOTH notes, in order). Average_Wage ' 1,234.5 ' = trim+de-comma overlap on a DECIMAL (documents F4 at integration: the trim is folded under the strip_commas note). Total_Exp '1.2.3' = un-coercible DECIMAL (R2-TYPE-01:coercion_failed -> cell null, row KEPT, Q1). month 'Smarch' = unparseable month (R2-DATE-01:parse_failed -> cell null, row KEPT). fin_year '2022-2023' is valid and canonicalizes, to show the DATE success note coexisting with the failures in the same row.
